description.zh: 清朝以军机处为核心决策机构，军机大臣由皇帝亲选，直接承旨办事，决策迅速高效。实行满汉合作，六部设满汉双尚书，以满人为主导、汉人为辅助。总督巡抚制管理地方，都察院负责监察，形成了中央集权与地方治理并重的体系。
description.en: The Qing Dynasty centered on the Grand Council as its core decision-making body, with councilors personally selected by the emperor for rapid, efficient governance. It practiced Manchu-Han cooperation with dual ministers in Six Ministries. Governors-General managed provinces while the Censorate provided oversight, balancing centralized power with provincial administration.
